_comment: Single source of the L1->L3 runtime-bundle contract. L1 (collect-runtime-bundle.sh) reads this to know which binaries go in each bundle; L3 (youtubedl-android tools/vendor_from_native_release.sh) reads the copy published in the release to lay bundles into jniLibs. The 'out' loader names and 'zip' names MUST match the runtime constants in the youtubedl-android library (YoutubeDL.kt pythonBinName/pythonLibName/quickJsBinName, FFmpeg.kt ffmpegBinName/ffmpegLibName, Aria2c.kt aria2cLibName) and ffprobe is libffprobe.so. Keep them in sync when either side changes.
